1	## Eino ADK DeepAgents Example: Excel Agent
     2	
     3	### Description
     4	Excel Agent is a "smart assistant who can understand Excel". It first breaks down the problem into steps, then executes and verifies the results step by step. It can understand user problems and uploaded file contents, propose feasible solutions, and select appropriate tools (system commands, generate and run Python code, network queries, etc.) to complete tasks.
     5	
     6	Before using this, you need to make some configurations:
     7	
     8	### Env
     9	```
    10	//（required）Basic LLM Model Config，currently support Ark and OpenAI models.
    11	// Ark model config
    12	export ARK_API_KEY=""   //（required）Ark Model API Key
    13	export ARK_MODEL=""     //（required）Ark Model name
    14	export ARK_BASE_URL=""  //（optional）Ark Model base_url
    15	export ARK_REGION=""    //（optional）Ark Model region
    16	
    17	// OpenAI model config
    18	export OPENAI_API_KEY=""       // (required）OpenAI Model API Key
    19	export OPENAI_MODEL=""         // (required）OpenAI Model name
    20	export OPENAI_BASE_URL=""      // (optional）OpenAI base_url
    21	export OPENAI_BY_AZURE="false" // (optional）OpenAI using Azure service or not
    22	
    23	//（optional）Python executable path，default using system python.
    24	// It's recommended to use venv, and install pandas / numpy / matplotlib / openpyxl before lanunching this agent.
    25	// When the code written by CodeAgent fails to run due to lack of dependencies, the pip command may be used to try to install dependencies. 
    26	// At this time, if you use python in the system environment, it may be blocked, causing the Excel Agent to fail to run and exit.
    27	export EXCEL_AGENT_PYTHON_EXECUTABLE_PATH="python"
    28	
    29	//（optional）Vision Model Config，default null, which ImagepReader tool in ReportAgent will not activate.
    30	export ARK_VISION_API_KEY=""    // Ark Vision Model API Key
    31	export ARK_VISION_MODEL=""      // Ark Vision Model name
    32	export ARK_VISION_BASE_URL=""   // Ark Vision Model base_url
    33	export ARK_VISION_REGION=""     // Ark Vision Model region
    34	```
    35	
    36	### Input 
    37	The input for Excel Agent is a description of user requirements and a series of files to be processed:
    38	- The first line in `main.go` represents the requirement description entered by the user:
    39	  ```
    40	    func main() {
    41	        // query := schema.UserMessage("Count the recommended novel names and recommended times in the attachment file, and write the results to the file. The content with "" is the name of the novel and forms a table. The header is the name of the novel and the number of recommendations. The novels with the same name are listed in only one line, and the number of recommendations is added")
    42	        // query := schema.UserMessage("Read the content in simulated question. csv, put the question, answer, resolution and options in the same line in a standardized format, and simply write the answer to the resolution")
    43	        query := schema.UserMessage("Please help me extract the first column in question.csv table into a new csv")
    44	    }
    45	  ```
    46	- `adk/multiagent/deep/playground/input` is the default attachment input path. For example, the `question.csv` file mentioned in the above query needs to be placed in this directory before it can be read by the agent. In addition, it supports the configuration of the environment variable `EXCEL_AGENT_INPUT_DIR` to set the attachment input path (absolute path).
    47	- Several sample files are provided in the path `adk/multiagent/deep/playground/test_data` for your test:
    48	  ```
    49	    % tree adk/multiagent/deep/playground/test_data
    50	    adk/multiagent/deep/playground/test_data
    51	    ├── questions.csv
    52	    ├── 推荐小说.txt
    53	    └── 模拟出题.csv
    54	    
    55	    1 directory, 3 files
    56	  ```
    57	
    58	### Output
    59	The default working directory is `adk/multiagent/deep/playground/${uuid}`. 
    60	
    61	You can set your own working directory by setting env: `export EXCEL_AGENT_WORK_DIR="your_path""` (the absolute path before/$uuid).

1	DeepAgent is a pre-built agent on top of ChatModelAgent that provides planning, filesystem access, shell execution, and sub-agent delegation out of the box.
     2	
     3	## Import
     4	
     5	Requires eino >= v0.5.14:
     6	
     7	```go
     8	import "github.com/cloudwego/eino/adk/prebuilt/deep"
     9	```
    10	
    11	## When to Use
    12	
    13	Use DeepAgent instead of plain ChatModelAgent when you need:
    14	
    15	- Built-in task planning (WriteTodos tool)
    16	- File system operations (read/write/edit/glob/grep)
    17	- Shell command execution
    18	- Sub-agent delegation with context isolation
    19	- Auto-summarization for long conversations
    20	
    21	Use plain ChatModelAgent when:
    22	
    23	- You need fine-grained control over tools and prompts
    24	- The task is simple (single tool, no planning needed)
    25	- You want to minimize token cost (DeepAgent's planning adds overhead)
    26	
    27	## Architecture
    28	
    29	```
    30	MainAgent (ChatModelAgent + built-in tools + prompt)
    31	    |
    32	    +-- WriteTodos tool (task planning)
    33	    +-- Built-in tools (read_file, write_file, edit_file, glob, grep, execute)
    34	    +-- TaskTool -> SubAgents
    35	            |
    36	            +-- GeneralPurpose (same tools as main, no TaskTool)
    37	            +-- Custom SubAgents
    38	```
    39	
    40	- MainAgent receives user input, plans via WriteTodos, delegates via TaskTool
    41	- SubAgents have isolated context (no shared history with MainAgent)
    42	- GeneralPurpose sub-agent is added by default for generic tasks
    43	
    44	## Configuration
    45	
    46	```go
    47	type Config struct {
    48	    // Required: the LLM model
    49	    Model model.ToolCallingChatModel
    50	
    51	    // Optional: filesystem backend for file operations
    52	    Backend filesystem.Backend
    53	
    54	    // Optional: shell execution (mutually exclusive with StreamingShell)
    55	    Shell filesystem.Shell
    56	
    57	    // Optional: streaming shell execution
    58	    StreamingShell filesystem.StreamingShell
    59	
    60	    // Optional: custom tools added to the main agent
    61	    Tools []tool.BaseTool
    62	
    63	    // Optional: custom sub-agents
    64	    SubAgents []adk.Agent
    65	
    66	    // Optional: custom system prompt (appended to built-in prompt)
    67	    Instruction string
    68	
    69	    // Optional: disable WriteTodos tool
    70	    WithoutWriteTodos bool
    71	
    72	    // Optional: disable the default general-purpose sub-agent
    73	    WithoutGeneralSubAgent bool
    74	
    75	    // Optional: custom TaskTool description generator
    76	    TaskToolDescriptionGenerator func(ctx context.Context, agents []adk.Agent) string
    77	
    78	    // Optional: middleware
    79	    Handlers []adk.ChatModelAgentMiddleware
    80	}
    81	```
    82	
    83	## Quick Start
    84	
    85	```go
    86	import (
    87	    "context"
    88	    "fmt"
    89	    "log"
    90	
    91	    "github.com/cloudwego/eino-ext/components/model/openai"
    92	    "github.com/cloudwego/eino/adk"
    93	    "github.com/cloudwego/eino/adk/filesystem"
    94	    "github.com/cloudwego/eino/adk/prebuilt/deep"
    95	)
    96	
    97	func main() {
    98	    ctx := context.Background()
    99	
   100	    cm, _ := openai.NewChatModel(ctx, &openai.ChatModelConfig{
   101	        APIKey: "your-key", Model: "gpt-4o",
   102	    })
   103	
   104	    backend := filesystem.NewInMemoryBackend()
   105	
   106	    agent, err := deep.New(ctx, &deep.Config{
   107	        Model:   cm,
   108	        Backend: backend,
   109	    })
   110	    if err != nil {
   111	        log.Fatal(err)
   112	    }
   113	
   114	    runner := adk.NewRunner(ctx, adk.RunnerConfig{Agent: agent})
   115	    iter := runner.Query(ctx, "Analyze the CSV file at /data/sales.csv and create a summary report")
   116	
   117	    for {
   118	        event, ok := iter.Next()
   119	        if !ok {
   120	            break
   121	        }
   122	        if event.Err != nil {
   123	            log.Fatal(event.Err)
   124	        }
   125	        if event.Output != nil && event.Output.MessageOutput != nil {
   126	            msg, _ := event.Output.MessageOutput.GetMessage()
   127	            fmt.Printf("[%s] %s\n", event.AgentName, msg.Content)
   128	        }
   129	    }
   130	}
   131	```
   132	
   133	## Built-in Capabilities
   134	
   135	### WriteTodos
   136	
   137	A planning tool that lets the agent create and track a structured task list. The agent calls WriteTodos to decompose complex tasks, then updates progress as it works.
   138	
   139	Disable with `WithoutWriteTodos: true`.
   140	
   141	### File System Tools
   142	
   143	When `Backend` is configured, the agent gets: `read_file`, `write_file`, `edit_file`, `glob`, `grep`.
   144	
   145	When `Shell` or `StreamingShell` is configured, the agent also gets: `execute`.
   146	
   147	### Task Delegation (TaskTool)
   148	
   149	When `SubAgents` are configured (or the default general-purpose sub-agent is enabled), the agent gets a `task` tool. The agent specifies which sub-agent to call and what task to perform.
   150	
   151	Sub-agents run in isolated context -- they only receive the task description, not the full conversation history.
   152	
   153	## Comparison with Other Patterns
   154	
   155	| Feature | DeepAgent | Plain ReAct | Plan-Execute |
   156	|---------|-----------|-------------|--------------|
   157	| Planning | Built-in (WriteTodos) | Manual | Separate planner agent |
   158	| Context isolation | Yes (sub-agents) | No | Depends |
   159	| Token cost | Higher (planning overhead) | Lower | Higher (separate plan) |
   160	| Model requirements | Higher (must plan well) | Lower | Medium |

## DeepAgent 是什么？

**DeepAgent** 是 Eino 框架中一个**预构建的高级 Agent**，它在 ChatModelAgent 基础上提供了开箱即用的能力。

---

## 🎯 主要用途

DeepAgent 适用于需要以下能力的场景：

| 能力 | 说明 |
|-----|-----|
| **任务规划** | 自动分解复杂任务为步骤，并跟踪进度 |
| **文件系统操作** | 读取/写入/编辑文件、glob/grep 搜索 |
| **Shell 命令执行** | 运行系统命令 |
| **子任务委托** | 将任务委派给子 Agent，上下文隔离 |
| **长对话自动摘要** | 处理超长对话时自动压缩上下文 |

---

## 📊 架构图

```
MainAgent (ChatModelAgent + 内置工具 + prompt)
    |
    +-- WriteTodos tool (任务规划)
    +-- 内置工具 (read_file, write_file, edit_file, glob, grep, execute)
    +-- TaskTool -> SubAgents
            |
            +-- GeneralPurpose (通用子Agent)
            +-- Custom SubAgents (自定义子Agent)
```

---

## 🔀 何时选择 DeepAgent vs ChatModelAgent？

**选 DeepAgent：**
- 需要自动任务规划
- 需要操作文件系统
- 需要执行 shell 命令
- 复杂多步骤任务
- 需要子任务委托和上下文隔离

**选 ChatModelAgent：**
- 简单任务（单工具调用）
- 需要精细控制工具和提示词
- 想要最小化 token 消耗（DeepAgent 的规划会增加开销）

---

## 💡 典型应用示例

文档中的 **Excel Agent** 就是一个 DeepAgent 的实际应用：

> Excel Agent 是一个"能理解 Excel 的智能助手"。它先把问题分解成步骤，然后逐步执行并验证结果。能理解用户问题和上传文件的内容，提出可行方案，选择合适的工具（系统命令、生成运行 Python 代码、网络查询等）完成任务。

例如：
- 分析 CSV 文件并生成报告
- 提取 Excel 表格数据
- 处理数据转换任务

---

1	DeepAgent is a pre-built agent on top of ChatModelAgent that provides planning, filesystem access, shell execution, and sub-agent delegation out of the box.
     2	
     3	## Import
     4	
     5	Requires eino >= v0.5.14:
     6	
     7	```go
     8	import "github.com/cloudwego/eino/adk/prebuilt/deep"
     9	```
    10	
    11	## When to Use
    12	
    13	Use DeepAgent instead of plain ChatModelAgent when you need:
    14	
    15	- Built-in task planning (WriteTodos tool)
    16	- File system operations (read/write/edit/glob/grep)
    17	- Shell command execution
    18	- Sub-agent delegation with context isolation
    19	- Auto-summarization for long conversations
    20	
    21	Use plain ChatModelAgent when:
    22	
    23	- You need fine-grained control over tools and prompts
    24	- The task is simple (single tool, no planning needed)
    25	- You want to minimize token cost (DeepAgent's planning adds overhead)
    26	
    27	## Architecture
    28	
    29	```
    30	MainAgent (ChatModelAgent + built-in tools + prompt)
    31	    |
    32	    +-- WriteTodos tool (task planning)
    33	    +-- Built-in tools (read_file, write_file, edit_file, glob, grep, execute)
    34	    +-- TaskTool -> SubAgents
    35	            |
    36	            +-- GeneralPurpose (same tools as main, no TaskTool)
    37	            +-- Custom SubAgents
    38	```
    39	
    40	- MainAgent receives user input, plans via WriteTodos, delegates via TaskTool
    41	- SubAgents have isolated context (no shared history with MainAgent)
    42	- GeneralPurpose sub-agent is added by default for generic tasks
    43	
    44	## Configuration
    45	
    46	```go
    47	type Config struct {
    48	    // Required: the LLM model
    49	    Model model.ToolCallingChatModel
    50	
    51	    // Optional: filesystem backend for file operations
    52	    Backend filesystem.Backend
    53	
    54	    // Optional: shell execution (mutually exclusive with StreamingShell)
    55	    Shell filesystem.Shell
    56	
    57	    // Optional: streaming shell execution
    58	    StreamingShell filesystem.StreamingShell
    59	
    60	    // Optional: custom tools added to the main agent
    61	    Tools []tool.BaseTool
    62	
    63	    // Optional: custom sub-agents
    64	    SubAgents []adk.Agent
    65	
    66	    // Optional: custom system prompt (appended to built-in prompt)
    67	    Instruction string
    68	
    69	    // Optional: disable WriteTodos tool
    70	    WithoutWriteTodos bool
    71	
    72	    // Optional: disable the default general-purpose sub-agent
    73	    WithoutGeneralSubAgent bool
    74	
    75	    // Optional: custom TaskTool description generator
    76	    TaskToolDescriptionGenerator func(ctx context.Context, agents []adk.Agent) string
    77	
    78	    // Optional: middleware
    79	    Handlers []adk.ChatModelAgentMiddleware
    80	}
    81	```
    82	
    83	## Quick Start
    84	
    85	```go
    86	import (
    87	    "context"
    88	    "fmt"
    89	    "log"
    90	
    91	    "github.com/cloudwego/eino-ext/components/model/openai"
    92	    "github.com/cloudwego/eino/adk"
    93	    "github.com/cloudwego/eino/adk/filesystem"
    94	    "github.com/cloudwego/eino/adk/prebuilt/deep"
    95	)
    96	
    97	func main() {
    98	    ctx := context.Background()
    99	
   100	    cm, _ := openai.NewChatModel(ctx, &openai.ChatModelConfig{
   101	        APIKey: "your-key", Model: "gpt-4o",
   102	    })
   103	
   104	    backend := filesystem.NewInMemoryBackend()
   105	
   106	    agent, err := deep.New(ctx, &deep.Config{
   107	        Model:   cm,
   108	        Backend: backend,
   109	    })
   110	    if err != nil {
   111	        log.Fatal(err)
   112	    }
   113	
   114	    runner := adk.NewRunner(ctx, adk.RunnerConfig{Agent: agent})
   115	    iter := runner.Query(ctx, "Analyze the CSV file at /data/sales.csv and create a summary report")
   116	
   117	    for {
   118	        event, ok := iter.Next()
   119	        if !ok {
   120	            break
   121	        }
   122	        if event.Err != nil {
   123	            log.Fatal(event.Err)
   124	        }
   125	        if event.Output != nil && event.Output.MessageOutput != nil {
   126	            msg, _ := event.Output.MessageOutput.GetMessage()
   127	            fmt.Printf("[%s] %s\n", event.AgentName, msg.Content)
   128	        }
   129	    }
   130	}

   132	
   133	## Built-in Capabilities
   134	
   135	### WriteTodos
   136	
   137	A planning tool that lets the agent create and track a structured task list. The agent calls WriteTodos to decompose complex tasks, then updates progress as it works.
   138	
   139	Disable with `WithoutWriteTodos: true`.
   140	
   141	### File System Tools
   142	
   143	When `Backend` is configured, the agent gets: `read_file`, `write_file`, `edit_file`, `glob`, `grep`.
   144	
   145	When `Shell` or `StreamingShell` is configured, the agent also gets: `execute`.
   146	
   147	### Task Delegation (TaskTool)
   148	
   149	When `SubAgents` are configured (or the default general-purpose sub-agent is enabled), the agent gets a `task` tool. The agent specifies which sub-agent to call and what task to perform.
   150	
   151	Sub-agents run in isolated context -- they only receive the task description, not the full conversation history.
   152	
   153	## Comparison with Other Patterns
   154	
   155	| Feature | DeepAgent | Plain ReAct | Plan-Execute |
   156	|---------|-----------|-------------|--------------|
   157	| Planning | Built-in (WriteTodos) | Manual | Separate planner agent |
   158	| Context isolation | Yes (sub-agents) | No | Depends |
   159	| Token cost | Higher (planning overhead) | Lower | Higher (separate plan) |
   160	| Model requirements | Higher (must plan well) | Lower | Medium |

1	# Human-in-the-Loop: Plan-Execute-Replan Pattern with Review-and-Edit
     2	
     3	This example demonstrates the **Plan-Execute-Replan** multi-agent pattern combined with the **Review-and-Edit** human-in-the-loop pattern.
     4	
     5	It showcases how to build a planning agent system where users can review and modify booking parameters before critical actions (like flight and hotel bookings) are executed.
     6	
     7	## How It Works
     8	
     9	1. **Plan-Execute-Replan Architecture**: The system consists of three specialized agents:
    10	   - **Planner**: Creates an initial plan based on user requirements
    11	   - **Executor**: Executes each step of the plan using available tools
    12	   - **Replanner**: Adjusts the plan based on execution results
    13	
    14	2. **Review-Edit Tools**: The `book_flight` and `book_hotel` tools are wrapped in `InvokableReviewEditTool`. This allows users to:
    15	   - Approve the booking as-is
    16	   - Modify the booking parameters (e.g., change dates, room type)
    17	   - Reject the booking entirely
    18	
    19	3. **Workflow**:
    20	   - User requests a travel plan (e.g., "Plan a 3-day trip to Tokyo")
    21	   - Planner creates a multi-step plan
    22	   - Executor attempts to book flights → **interrupt for review**
    23	   - User reviews/edits booking details → resume
    24	   - Executor attempts to book hotel → **interrupt for review**
    25	   - User reviews/edits → resume
    26	   - Plan completes with all bookings confirmed
    27	
    28	4. **Iterative Execution**: The plan-execute-replan pattern supports multiple iterations, allowing the replanner to adjust the plan based on execution results or user modifications.
    29

1	DeepAgent is a pre-built agent on top of ChatModelAgent that provides planning, filesystem access, shell execution, and sub-agent delegation out of the box.
     2	
     3	## Import
     4	
     5	Requires eino >= v0.5.14:
     6	
     7	```go
     8	import "github.com/cloudwego/eino/adk/prebuilt/deep"
     9	```
    10	
    11	## When to Use
    12	
    13	Use DeepAgent instead of plain ChatModelAgent when you need:
    14	
    15	- Built-in task planning (WriteTodos tool)
    16	- File system operations (read/write/edit/glob/grep)
    17	- Shell command execution
    18	- Sub-agent delegation with context isolation
    19	- Auto-summarization for long conversations
    20	
    21	Use plain ChatModelAgent when:
    22	
    23	- You need fine-grained control over tools and prompts
    24	- The task is simple (single tool, no planning needed)
    25	- You want to minimize token cost (DeepAgent's planning adds overhead)
    26	
    27	## Architecture
    28	
    29	```
    30	MainAgent (ChatModelAgent + built-in tools + prompt)
    31	    |
    32	    +-- WriteTodos tool (task planning)
    33	    +-- Built-in tools (read_file, write_file, edit_file, glob, grep, execute)
    34	    +-- TaskTool -> SubAgents
    35	            |
    36	            +-- GeneralPurpose (same tools as main, no TaskTool)
    37	            +-- Custom SubAgents
    38	```
    39	
    40	- MainAgent receives user input, plans via WriteTodos, delegates via TaskTool
    41	- SubAgents have isolated context (no shared history with MainAgent)
    42	- GeneralPurpose sub-agent is added by default for generic tasks
    43	
    44	## Configuration
    45	
    46	```go
    47	type Config struct {
    48	    // Required: the LLM model
    49	    Model model.ToolCallingChatModel
    50	
    51	    // Optional: filesystem backend for file operations
    52	    Backend filesystem.Backend
    53	
    54	    // Optional: shell execution (mutually exclusive with StreamingShell)
    55	    Shell filesystem.Shell
    56	
    57	    // Optional: streaming shell execution
    58	    StreamingShell filesystem.StreamingShell
    59	
    60	    // Optional: custom tools added to the main agent
    61	    Tools []tool.BaseTool
    62	
    63	    // Optional: custom sub-agents
    64	    SubAgents []adk.Agent
    65	
    66	    // Optional: custom system prompt (appended to built-in prompt)
    67	    Instruction string
    68	
    69	    // Optional: disable WriteTodos tool
    70	    WithoutWriteTodos bool
    71	
    72	    // Optional: disable the default general-purpose sub-agent
    73	    WithoutGeneralSubAgent bool
    74	
    75	    // Optional: custom TaskTool description generator
    76	    TaskToolDescriptionGenerator func(ctx context.Context, agents []adk.Agent) string
    77	
    78	    // Optional: middleware
    79	    Handlers []adk.ChatModelAgentMiddleware
    80	}
    81	```
    82	
    83	## Quick Start
    84	
    85	```go

    87	    "context"
    88	    "fmt"
    89	    "log"
    90	
    91	    "github.com/cloudwego/eino-ext/components/model/openai"
    92	    "github.com/cloudwego/eino/adk"

    95	)

    98	    ctx := context.Background()
    99	
   100	    cm, _ := openai.NewChatModel(ctx, &openai.ChatModelConfig{
   101	        APIKey: "your-key", Model: "gpt-4o",
   102	    })
   103	
   104	    backend := filesystem.NewInMemoryBackend()

   106	    agent, err := deep.New(ctx, &deep.Config{

   112	    }

   114	    runner := adk.NewRunner(ctx, adk.RunnerConfig{Agent: agent})
   115	    iter := runner.Query(ctx, "Analyze the CSV file at /data/sales.csv and create a summary report")

   132	
   133	## Built-in Capabilities
   134	
   135	### WriteTodos
   136	
   137	A planning tool that lets the agent create and track a structured task list. The agent calls WriteTodos to decompose complex tasks, then updates progress as it works.
   138	
   139	Disable with `WithoutWriteTodos: true`.
   140	
   141	### File System Tools
   142	
   143	When `Backend` is configured, the agent gets: `read_file`, `write_file`, `edit_file`, `glob`, `grep`.
   144	
   145	When `Shell` or `StreamingShell` is configured, the agent also gets: `execute`.
   146	
   147	### Task Delegation (TaskTool)
   148	
   149	When `SubAgents` are configured (or the default general-purpose sub-agent is enabled), the agent gets a `task` tool. The agent specifies which sub-agent to call and what task to perform.
   150	
   151	Sub-agents run in isolated context -- they only receive the task description, not the full conversation history.
   152	
   153	## Comparison with Other Patterns
   154	
   155	| Feature | DeepAgent | Plain ReAct | Plan-Execute |
   156	|---------|-----------|-------------|--------------|
   157	| Planning | Built-in (WriteTodos) | Manual | Separate planner agent |
   158	| Context isolation | Yes (sub-agents) | No | Depends |
   159	| Token cost | Higher (planning overhead) | Lower | Higher (separate plan) |
   160	| Model requirements | Higher (must plan well) | Lower | Medium |

   149	When `SubAgents` are configured (or the default general-purpose sub-agent is enabled), the agent gets a `task` tool. The agent specifies which sub-agent to call and what task to perform.
   150	
   151	Sub-agents run in isolated context -- they only receive the task description, not the full conversation history.
   152	
   153	## Comparison with Other Patterns
   154	
   155	| Feature | DeepAgent | Plain ReAct | Plan-Execute |
   156	|---------|-----------|-------------|--------------|
   157	| Planning | Built-in (WriteTodos) | Manual | Separate planner agent |
   158	| Context isolation | Yes (sub-agents) | No | Depends |
   159	| Token cost | Higher (planning overhead) | Lower | Higher (separate plan) |
   160	| Model requirements | Higher (must plan well) | Lower | Medium |

     3	---
     4	
     5	本章目标:为 Agent 添加 Tool 能力,让 Agent 能够访问文件系统。
     6	
     7	## 为什么需要 Tool
     8	
     9	前三章我们实现的 Agent 只能对话,无法执行实际操作。
    10	
    11	**Agent 的局限:**
    12	- 只能生成文本回复
    13	- 无法访问外部资源(文件、API、数据库等)
    14	- 无法执行实际任务(计算、查询、修改等)
    15	
    16	**Tool 的定位:**
    17	- **Tool 是 Agent 的能力扩展**:让 Agent 能够执行具体操作
    18	- **Tool 封装了具体实现**:Agent 不关心 Tool 内部如何工作,只关心输入输出
    19	- **Tool 可组合**:一个 Agent 可以有多个 Tool,根据需要选择调用
    20	
    21	**简单类比:**
    22	- **Agent** = "智能助手"(能理解指令,但需要工具才能执行)
    23	- **Tool** = "工具箱"(文件操作、网络请求、数据库查询等)
    24	
    25	## 为什么需要文件系统能力
    26	
    27	本示例是 ChatWithDoc(与文档对话),目标是帮助用户学习 Eino 框架并编写 Eino 代码。那么,最好的文档是什么?
    28	
    29	**答案就是:Eino 仓库的代码本身。**
    30	
    31	- **Code**: 源代码展示了框架的真实实现
    32	- **Comment**: 代码注释提供了设计思路和使用说明
    33	- **Examples**: 示例代码演示了最佳实践
    34	
    35	通过文件系统访问能力,Agent 可以直接读取 Eino 源码、注释和示例,为用户提供最准确、最及时的技术支持。
    36	
    37	## 关键概念
    38	
    39	### Tool 接口
    40	
    41	`Tool` 是 Eino 中定义可执行能力的接口:
    42	
    43	```go
    44	// BaseTool 提供工具的元信息,ChatModel 使用这些信息决定是否以及如何调用工具
    45	type BaseTool interface {
    46	    Info(ctx context.Context) (*schema.ToolInfo, error)
    47	}
    48	
    49	// InvokableTool 是可以被 ToolsNode 执行的工具
    50	type InvokableTool interface {
    51	    BaseTool
    52	    // InvokableRun 执行工具,参数是 JSON 编码的字符串,返回字符串结果
    53	    InvokableRun(ctx context.Context, argumentsInJSON string, opts ...Option) (string, error)
    54	}
    55	
    56	// StreamableTool 是 InvokableTool 的流式变体
    57	type StreamableTool interface {
    58	    BaseTool
    59	    // StreamableRun 流式执行工具,返回 StreamReader
    60	    StreamableRun(ctx context.Context, argumentsInJSON string, opts ...Option) (*schema.StreamReader[string], error)
    61	}
    62	```
    63	
    64	**接口层次:**
    65	- `BaseTool`:基础接口,只提供元信息
    66	- `InvokableTool`:可执行工具(继承 BaseTool)
    67	- `StreamableTool`:流式工具(继承 BaseTool)
    68	
    69	### Backend 接口
    70	
    71	`Backend` 是 Eino 中用于文件系统操作的抽象接口:
    72	
    73	```go
    74	type Backend interface {
    75	    // 列出目录下的文件信息
    76	    LsInfo(ctx context.Context, req *LsInfoRequest) ([]FileInfo, error)
    77	    
    78	    // 读取文件内容,支持按行偏移和限制
    79	    Read(ctx context.Context, req *ReadRequest) (*FileContent, error)
    80	    
    81	    // 在文件中搜索匹配的内容
    82	    GrepRaw(ctx context.Context, req *GrepRequest) ([]GrepMatch, error)
    83	    
    84	    // 根据 glob 模式匹配文件
    85	    GlobInfo(ctx context.Context, req *GlobInfoRequest) ([]FileInfo, error)
    86	    
    87	    // 写入文件内容
    88	    Write(ctx context.Context, req *WriteRequest) error
    89	    
    90	    // 编辑文件内容(字符串替换)
    91	    Edit(ctx context.Context, req *EditRequest) error
    92	}
    93	```
    94	
    95	### LocalBackend
    96	
    97	`LocalBackend` 是 Backend 的本地文件系统实现,直接访问操作系统的文件系统:
    98	
    99	```go
   100	import localbk "github.com/cloudwego/eino-ext/adk/backend/local"
   101	
   102	backend, err := localbk.NewBackend(ctx, &localbk.Config{})
   103	```
   104	
   105	**特点:**
   106	- 直接访问本地文件系统,使用 Go 标准库实现
   107	- 支持所有 Backend 接口方法
   108	- 支持执行 shell 命令(ExecuteStreaming)
   109	- 路径安全:要求使用绝对路径,防止目录遍历攻击
   110	- 零配置:开箱即用,无需额外设置
   111	
   112	## 实现:使用 DeepAgent
   113	
   114	本章使用 DeepAgent 预构建 Agent,它提供了 Backend 和 StreamingShell 的一级配置,可以方便地注册文件系统相关的工具。
   115	
   116	### 从 ChatModelAgent 到 DeepAgent：何时需要切换？
   117	
   118	前面章节一直使用 `ChatModelAgent`,它已经能处理多轮对话。但要访问文件系统，我们需要切换到 `DeepAgent`。
   119	
   120	**ChatModelAgent vs DeepAgent 对比：**
   121	
   122	| 能力 | ChatModelAgent | DeepAgent |
   123	|------|----------------|-----------|
   124	| 多轮对话 | ✅ | ✅ |
   125	| 添加自定义 Tool | ✅ 手动注册每个 Tool | ✅ 手动注册或自动注册 |
   126	| 文件系统访问（Backend） | ❌ 需手动创建并注册所有文件工具 | ✅ 一级配置，自动注册 |
   127	| 命令执行（StreamingShell） | ❌ 需手动创建 | ✅ 一级配置，自动注册 |
   128	| 内置任务管理 | ❌ | ✅ `write_todos` 工具 |
   129	| 支持子 Agent | ❌ | ✅ |
   130	
   131	**选择建议：**
   132	- 纯对话场景（无外部访问）→ 用 `ChatModelAgent`
   133	- 需要访问文件系统或执行命令 → 用 `DeepAgent`
   134	
   135	### 为什么使用 DeepAgent?
   136	
   137	相比直接使用 ChatModelAgent,DeepAgent 的优势:
   138	
   139	1. **一级配置**: Backend 和 StreamingShell 是一级配置,直接传入即可
   140	2. **自动注册工具**: 配置 Backend 后自动注册文件系统工具,无需手动创建
   141	3. **内置任务管理**: 提供 `write_todos` 工具,支持任务规划和跟踪
   142	4. **支持子 Agent**: 可以配置专门的子 Agent 处理特定任务
   143	5. **更强大**: 集成了文件系统、命令执行等多种能力
   144	
   145	### 代码实现
   146	
   147	```go
   148	import (
   149	    localbk "github.com/cloudwego/eino-ext/adk/backend/local"
   150	    "github.com/cloudwego/eino/adk/prebuilt/deep"
   151	)
   152	
   153	// 创建 LocalBackend
   154	backend, err := localbk.NewBackend(ctx, &localbk.Config{})
   155	
   156	// 创建 DeepAgent,自动注册文件系统工具
   157	agent, err := deep.New(ctx, &deep.Config{
   158	    Name:           "Ch04ToolAgent",
   159	    Description:    "ChatWithDoc agent with filesystem access via LocalBackend.",
   160	    ChatModel:      cm,
   161	    Instruction:    instruction,
   162	    Backend:        backend,        // 提供文件系统操作能力
   163	    StreamingShell: backend,        // 提供命令执行能力
   164	    MaxIteration:   50,
   165	})
   166	```
   167	
   168	### DeepAgent 自动注册的工具
   169	
   170	当配置了 `Backend` 和 `StreamingShell` 后,DeepAgent 会自动注册以下工具:
   171	
   172	- `read_file`: 读取文件内容
   173	- `write_file`: 写入文件内容
   174	- `edit_file`: 编辑文件内容
   175	- `glob`: 根据 glob 模式查找文件
   176	- `grep`: 在文件中搜索内容
   177	- `execute`: 执行 shell 命令

   258	┌─────────────────────────────────────────┐
   259	│  用户:列出当前目录的文件                 │

   267	        ┌──────────────────────┐
   268	        │  生成 Tool Call       │
   269	        │  {"pattern": "*"}     │
   270	        └──────────────────────┘
   271	                   ↓
   272	        ┌──────────────────────┐
   273	        │  执行 Tool            │
   274	        │  glob("*")            │
   275	        └──────────────────────┘
   276	                   ↓
   277	        ┌──────────────────────┐
   278	        │  返回 Tool Result     │
   279	        │  {"files": [...]}     │
   280	        └──────────────────────┘

   283	        │  Agent 生成回复       │

   287	
   288	## 本章小结
   289	
   290	- **Tool**:Agent 的能力扩展,让 Agent 能够执行具体操作
   291	- **Backend**:文件系统操作的抽象接口,提供统一的文件操作能力
   292	- **LocalBackend**:Backend 的本地文件系统实现,直接访问操作系统文件系统
   293	- **DeepAgent**:预构建的高级 Agent,提供 Backend 和 StreamingShell 的一级配置
   294	- **自动注册工具**:配置 Backend 后自动注册文件系统工具
   295	- **Tool 调用流程**:Agent 分析意图 → 生成 Tool Call → 执行 Tool → 返回结果 → 生成回复
   296

    27	type FullPlan struct {
    28		TaskID     int           `json:"task_id,omitempty"`
    29		Status     PlanStatus    `json:"status,omitempty"`
    30		AgentName  string        `json:"agent_name,omitempty"`
    31		Desc       string        `json:"desc,omitempty"`
    32		ExecResult *SubmitResult `json:"exec_result,omitempty"`
    33	}
    34	
    35	type PlanStatus string
    36	
    37	const (
    38		PlanStatusTodo    PlanStatus = "todo"
    39		PlanStatusDoing   PlanStatus = "doing"
    40		PlanStatusDone    PlanStatus = "done"
    41		PlanStatusFailed  PlanStatus = "failed"
    42		PlanStatusSkipped PlanStatus = "skipped"
    43	)
    44	
    45	var PlanStatusMapping = map[PlanStatus]string{
    46		PlanStatusTodo:    "待执行",
    47		PlanStatusDoing:   "执行中",
    48		PlanStatusDone:    "已完成",
    49		PlanStatusFailed:  "执行失败",
    50		PlanStatusSkipped: "已跳过",
    51	}

    53	func (p *FullPlan) String() string {
    54		status, ok := PlanStatusMapping[p.Status]
    55		if !ok {
    56			status = string(p.Status)
    57		}
    58		res := fmt.Sprintf("%d. **[%s]** %s", p.TaskID, status, p.Desc)
    59		if p.ExecResult != nil {
    60			res += fmt.Sprintf("\n%s", p.ExecResult.String())
    61		}
    62		return res
    63	}

    70	}

    78	}

    10	
    11	## When to Use
    12	
    13	Use DeepAgent instead of plain ChatModelAgent when you need:
    14	
    15	- Built-in task planning (WriteTodos tool)
    16	- File system operations (read/write/edit/glob/grep)
    17	- Shell command execution
    18	- Sub-agent delegation with context isolation
    19	- Auto-summarization for long conversations
    20	
    21	Use plain ChatModelAgent when:
    22	
    23	- You need fine-grained control over tools and prompts
    24	- The task is simple (single tool, no planning needed)
    25	- You want to minimize token cost (DeepAgent's planning adds overhead)
    26	
    27	## Architecture
    28	
    29	```
    30	MainAgent (ChatModelAgent + built-in tools + prompt)
    31	    |
    32	    +-- WriteTodos tool (task planning)
    33	    +-- Built-in tools (read_file, write_file, edit_file, glob, grep, execute)
    34	    +-- TaskTool -> SubAgents
    35	            |
    36	            +-- GeneralPurpose (same tools as main, no TaskTool)
    37	            +-- Custom SubAgents
    38	```
    39	
    40	- MainAgent receives user input, plans via WriteTodos, delegates via TaskTool
    41	- SubAgents have isolated context (no shared history with MainAgent)
    42	- GeneralPurpose sub-agent is added by default for generic tasks

    26	
    27	type FullPlan struct {
    28		TaskID     int           `json:"task_id,omitempty"`
    29		Status     PlanStatus    `json:"status,omitempty"`
    30		AgentName  string        `json:"agent_name,omitempty"`
    31		Desc       string        `json:"desc,omitempty"`
    32		ExecResult *SubmitResult `json:"exec_result,omitempty"`
    33	}
    34	
    35	type PlanStatus string
    36	
    37	const (
    38		PlanStatusTodo    PlanStatus = "todo"
    39		PlanStatusDoing   PlanStatus = "doing"
    40		PlanStatusDone    PlanStatus = "done"
    41		PlanStatusFailed  PlanStatus = "failed"
    42		PlanStatusSkipped PlanStatus = "skipped"
    43	)
    44	
    45	var PlanStatusMapping = map[PlanStatus]string{
    46		PlanStatusTodo:    "待执行",
    47		PlanStatusDoing:   "执行中",
    48		PlanStatusDone:    "已完成",
    49		PlanStatusFailed:  "执行失败",
    50		PlanStatusSkipped: "已跳过",
    51	}
    52	
    53	func (p *FullPlan) String() string {
    54		status, ok := PlanStatusMapping[p.Status]
    55		if !ok {
    56			status = string(p.Status)
    57		}
    58		res := fmt.Sprintf("%d. **[%s]** %s", p.TaskID, status, p.Desc)
    59		if p.ExecResult != nil {
    60			res += fmt.Sprintf("\n%s", p.ExecResult.String())
    61		}
    62		return res
    63	}
    64	
    65	func (p *FullPlan) PlanString(n int) string {
    66		if p.Status != PlanStatusDoing && p.Status != PlanStatusTodo {
    67			return fmt.Sprintf("- [x] %d. %s", n, p.Desc)
    68		}
    69		return fmt.Sprintf("- [ ] %d. %s", n, p.Desc)
    70	}
    71	
    72	func FullPlan2String(plan []*FullPlan) string {
    73		planStr := "### 任务计划\n"
    74		for i, p := range plan {
    75			planStr += p.PlanString(i+1) + "\n"
    76		}
    77		return planStr
    78	}
    79	
    80	func Write2PlanMD(ctx context.Context, op commandline.Operator, wd string, plan []*FullPlan) error {
    81		planStr := FullPlan2String(plan)
    82		filePath := filepath.Join(wd, "plan.md")
    83		return op.WriteFile(ctx, filePath, planStr)
    84	}
